text:
Once upon a time in a quiet town lived a boy named Max. He loved exploring the woods behind his house. One afternoon he came across an old stone bridge.

Max jumped lightly onto it. It creaked loudly. He tiptoed across. Birds sang. His shadow disappeared. The farther he went, denser the forest seemed.

He found a small clearing. Bees buzzed. A rabbit nibbled grass. Max stopped to listen. Quiet rustles. Something furry stepped aside.

Suddenly Max’s head spun. There! A fox! He stared. The fox stared back. It blinked. Max remembered. He ran. The fox didn’t chase.

Back home Max sat quiet. The sun set. Fireflies flickered. He smiled.

He learned: don’t stare too long. Stay safe. Adventures were okay—all rules.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
